macro.title: Reducing risk: Why logging, protection, and review matter
macro.what: In real estate, title insurance, and mortgage lending, transactions depend on technology operating accurately and securely behind the scenes
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Redfin Economists’ Weekly Take: Rates Will Jump Around As Markets Weigh Iran War and Fed Outlook
macro.what: This Week In A Nutshell: We’re expecting rates to continue bouncing around this week, as the Middle East conflict continues into its third week with no clear off-ramp and markets anticipate the upcoming Fed meeting
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: eXp defendants move to toss Roberts sexual assault lawsuit ahead of April hearing
macro.what: Los Angeles federal judge set an April 17 hearing on summary judgment motions by eXp World, its CEO and two former agents.

macro.title: Housing muni market swells amid affordability policy debate
macro.what: Financing affordable housing development – typically for lower-income households – is one of the most challenging matters in real estate
macro.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
macro.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

macro.title: The Oldest Americans Held More Real Estate Wealth Than Ever Before In 2025
macro.what: For the first time, the oldest Americans (70+) held a larger share of real estate wealth than middle-aged Americans (40-54)

macro.title: 1 in 5 Homeowners With a Mortgage Could Save Money By Refinancing–But Few Are Taking the Plunge
macro.what: The share of homeowners who are “in the money” for a refinance has hit its highest level in over four years as mortgage rates dip to around 6%

housing.title: Tidalwave AI tops general models in mortgage underwriting accuracy benchmark
housing.what: The benchmarking evaluated Tidalwave’s SOLO agent against Claude 4.5 from Anthropic on 90 questions commonly asked by loan officers during the mortgage origination process.
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Keller Williams, REMAX, HomeServices, Side, United counter Compass–Redfin–Rocket push with Zillow’s new listing preview platform
housing.what: Zillow debuts Preview for public pre-marketing and offering priority placement, launching with KW, REMAX, HomeServices, United and Side.
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: JAUST unveils automated underwriting platform for jumbo mortgages
housing.what: JAUST launched a cloud-based automated underwriting system built for jumbo mortgages, targeting faster decisions and lower costs.
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Homebuilder confidence nudges up but remains below par
housing.what: Builder confidence stayed at 38 in March, with 37% cutting prices and oil near $100 per barrel adding pressure to demand and costs.
housing.why: Supply pipeline sets future inventory and construction activity.
housing.market: Stronger pipeline aids suppliers; oversupply later can weigh on pricing.

housing.title: Wyoming refund exposes legal risk for local housing fee ordinances
housing.what: Small wins on impact fees occasionally occur in costly U.S
housing.why: Supply pipeline sets future inventory and construction activity.
housing.market: Stronger pipeline aids suppliers; oversupply later can weigh on pricing.

housing.title: Letting Home Sellers Test the Waters Before Listing Could Boost Housing Supply as Much as 12%
housing.what: Redfin estimates inventory could increase 6%-12% in markets where sellers have the flexibility to test out pricing strategies before listing
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Methodology: Inventory Impact of Phased Marketing
housing.what: This methodology accompanies Redfin’s report about how letting home sellers test the market before officially listing could boost housing supply
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

notables.title: Closinglock launches automated closing updates
notables.what: Updates allow title companies, settlement firms and real estate law offices to send automatic status updates to transaction stakeholders.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: Rhino’s DealShield targets climate risk home insurability in California
notables.what: Rhino launched DealShield in California, offering listing-level insurability reports and quotes, with multistate plans by the end of 2026.
notables.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
notables.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.
